customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.description: Manage your custom fields and configurations

packs.title: Gacha Packs
packs.subtitle: Create and manage gacha packs — listing details, status, and prize pools. Open a pack to edit its prize pool and win rates.

form.subtitle: Sets the pack's storefront listing. A new pack starts with an empty prize pool — open it afterwards to add cards.
form.slugHint: Unique, lowercase, kebab-case. Permanent — it keys the pack and its /claw URL.
form.boostHint: Flags the pack as boosted/featured on the storefront.
form.poolHint: After creating, open the pack to add cards to its prize pool.

delete.title: Delete pack?
delete.description: This permanently removes "{{title}}" and its prize-pool membership. Cards and past pulls are kept. This cannot be undone.

pool.title: Prize pool
pool.subtitle: Pick the cards in this pack. {{count}} selected. New cards start at an even weight — tune the win rates below after saving.
pool.loadError: Could not load the card catalog.
pool.noCards: No cards exist yet. Create cards first.

editor.title: Win rates
editor.subtitle: Lock a card to pin its win rate; unlocked cards split the remainder evenly. These weights are secret — customers never see them.
editor.flattenWarning: No cards are locked — saving will reset every card to an even {{pct}}%. Lock the cards you want to preserve first.

cards.title: Gacha Cards
cards.subtitle: The card catalog — gacha prizes and standalone marketplace listings. Editing a card updates its marketplace listing automatically.

list.empty: No cards yet. Create one to get started.

form.subtitle: Sets the gacha prize details and the standalone marketplace listing (same card, one record).
form.uploadHint: Upload a file, or paste a storefront-relative path (e.g. /cdn/cards/x.webp).
form.handleHint: Unique, lowercase, kebab-case. Permanent — it keys the card everywhere.
form.name: Name
form.forSaleHint: When off, the card stays a pack prize but is hidden from the store.

delete.title: Delete card?
delete.description: This permanently removes "{{name}}", its marketplace listing, and its membership in every pack. Past pulls are kept. This cannot be undone.

pulls.title: Pull Ledger
pulls.subtitle: Every pack opened, the card won, and who pulled it.
pulls.loadError: Could not load the pull ledger.
